title: Kooroo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kooroo''' may refer to one of the following:

*The [[Shrine of Kooroo|'''Shrines of Kooroo''']], a series of structures present on several [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]
**The [[Shrine of Kooroo (Boztrok)|'''Shrine of Kooroo''']] located on the planet [[Boztrok]]
**The [[Shrine of Kooroo (Gelgelar)|'''Shrine of Kooroo''']] located on the planet [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]]
***The '''[[Wise Man of Kooroo]]''', a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Hermit/Legends|hermit]] residing in the Gelgelar Shrine of Kooroo
**The '''[[Temple of Kooroo]]''', a Shrine of Kooroo located on the planet [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]]
***The '''[[Kooroo Sundial]]''', an artifact discovered in the Temple of Kooroo
*The [[Kooroo (species)|'''Kooroo''']], a theorized [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] believed to have constructed the Shrines of Kooroo
**The '''[[Kooroo system]]''', a theorized [[Star system/Legends|star system]] where the Kooroo species originated
*The '''[[Fellowship of Kooroo]]''', a cult based around the Shrines of Kooroo
**[[Kooroo (being)|'''Kooroo''']], a being claimed to be the spiritual leader of the Fellowship of Kooroo
***The '''[[Teachings of Kooroo]]''', a parchment scroll supposedly containing the meditations of Kooroo
**The '''[[Pilgrimage of Kooroo]]''', a religious journey undertaken by members of the Fellowship of Kooroo

{{Disambig}}

}}
